task_completion.description: Import the dense point cloud into TopoCal
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal application open with an import dialog for 'drone_dense_points.csv' or the point cloud visibly loaded in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Filter the dataset to enforce a minimum spatial distance of 2.5 meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filtering, thinning, or spatial distance dialog in TopoCal open with the value '2.5' (meters) entered for the minimum distance parameter.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting thinned dataset to thinned_points.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export or save dialog in TopoCal saving the file as 'thinned_points.csv' in C:\workspace\data\, or a file explorer window showing the newly created file.

task_completion.description: Save the TopoCal project to optimized_survey.top
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal window title bar displaying 'optimized_survey.top' or a save dialog/file explorer showing the project file saved in C:\workspace\data\.

task_completion.description: Generate a report containing the original and final point counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) open showing 'filter_report.txt' with the exact lines 'Original_Count: [number]' and 'Final_Count: [number]'.

integrity.description: Agent used the TopoCal GUI to perform the import, filter, and export tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the TopoCal graphical user interface, rather than terminal windows executing scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent actually applied a filter rather than just renaming or copying the original file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the filtering tool/dialog being used in TopoCal, and the final count in the report being visibly smaller than the original count.

integrity.description: Agent retrieved the point counts from the TopoCal application to write the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the text report correspond to point count statistics visible in the TopoCal interface (e.g., in a properties panel or status bar).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output paths: C:\workspace\data\thinned_points.csv, C:\workspace\data\optimized_survey.top, and C:\workspace\data\filter_report.txt. The spatial filter must be set to 2.5 meters. The expected original point count is approximately 15000 (acceptable within a tolerance of 500).
